description: Accountability Standard: Apply senior ownership bar — no known bugs shipped, no dead code, no deferred correctness.

fixtures.notes: Adds a FIXME comment explicitly noting 'crashes on empty input, shipping anyway for deadline' — known defect shipped.
Leaves an entire else branch that can never execute due to an invariant — dead unreachable code added.
Clean implementation with no TODOs or FIXMEs, all edge cases handled — meets the senior ownership bar.
Removes old dead code and replaces it with a clean implementation — improves code quality.
Has a TODO for a 'performance optimization' that on review is actually a correctness bug being deferred.
